issues.description: Counter trigger should have a single PowerBoost action with conditional logic, not two separate PowerBoost actions. The second boost is conditional on hand size (≤4 cards).
Second effect (ReturnToHand action) is completely unrelated to the card text. This effect should not exist. The card only describes power boosts conditional on hand size.
Target should clarify 'up to 1' selection. Current scope allows multiple targets without quantity limit.
Conditional PowerBoost (the +2000 when hand ≤4) requires a condition field referencing hand count, not a separate independent action.
